trades.reasoning: Perfect score with all 5 bullish signals: RSI in momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and volume surge — strongest setup on the board.
Perfect score with all 5 bullish signals including volume surge; cybersecurity/data management sector showing relative strength in a down tape.
Perfect score with all 5 bullish signals at an affordable price point; RSI at 67.5 leaves room before overbought territory.

decisions.briefing: Markets closed modestly lower today with NASDAQ off 0.9% and S&P 500 down 0.5%, a neutral-to-cautious tape. Despite the broad weakness, the screener surfaced six perfect-score candidates with volume surges — a sign of rotation into specific names rather than a risk-off day. Deploying remaining cash into RVMD, CVLT, and GTLB to fill open slots and put idle cash to work in the highest-conviction setups available.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted lower on Tuesday as tech-heavy NASDAQ led the decline with a 0.9% drop, dragged by caution around upcoming Big Tech earnings and lingering macro uncertainty. The S&P 500 slipped 0.5% as investors rotated out of megacap names and into select mid- and small-cap momentum stocks showing strong earnings outlooks. Volume surges in individual names like RVMD and CVLT suggest institutional accumulation even as the broader index sold off.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週二普遍走低，科技股為主的納斯達克指數領跌0.9%，市場對即將公布的大型科技股財報持觀望態度，加上宏觀不確定性持續壓制情緒。標普500指數下跌0.5%，資金從大型科技股流出，轉向部分中小型動能股。RVMD、CVLT等個股成交量顯著放大，反映即便大盤走弱，仍有機構資金選擇逢低佈局具基本面支撐的標的。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks showing strong recent price and volume trends, betting that winners keep winning in the short term. Indicators like RSI (measuring speed of price moves), MACD (tracking trend direction), and volume surges all signal when a stock has building momentum. Today's top candidates scored 100 by combining all three signals at once — exactly what momentum investors look for.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期價格與成交量趨勢強勁的股票，押注強勢股短期內仍會持續上漲。RSI（衡量價格變動速度）、MACD（追蹤趨勢方向）以及成交量急增，都是判斷個股動能是否積聚的重要指標。今日評分滿分的候選股同時具備上述三大信號，正是動能投資者最青睞的進場型態。
